title: Replace all broken product images with AI-generated illustrations across all product sections

requirements.text: In KitchenUtensils.tsx, replace all broken or missing product image references with the newly generated static image assets stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Each of the 5 product cards must display its corresponding generated image: Milton Insignia Casserole, Crystal Wooden Serving Trays, Milton Pearl Thermoware Insulated Casserole, Senso Finger Chipser, and Cello Puro Kids & Junior Water Bottles. Use tags with correct relative paths pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/.

quotes: paste some of the photos by your own to the website
according to the kitchen use utensils and the things

acceptanceCriteria: All 5 product cards in the Kitchen Utensils section display a visible, correctly loaded image
Image paths correctly resolve to frontend/public/assets/generated/ filenames
No broken image icons appear in the Kitchen Utensils section

requirements.text: In HouseholdProducts.tsx, replace the broken or missing dustbin product image reference with the newly generated static image asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/. The single product card must display the colorful dustbins image visibly using an tag with the correct path.

quotes: according to the sections display all the things because the pictures are not visible

acceptanceCriteria: The Household Products section displays a visible, correctly loaded dustbin image
No broken image icon appears in the Household Products section

requirements.text: In ProductCategories.tsx, replace all broken or missing category card images with the newly generated static image assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Each of the 6 category cards (Stainless Steel Utensils, Pressure Cookers, Cookware Sets, Kitchen Tools, Plastic Household Items, Gift Items) must display a visible generated image that is visually appropriate for that category.

quotes: according to the sections display all the things because the pictures are not visible

acceptanceCriteria: All 6 product category cards display a visible, relevant image
No broken image icons appear in the Product Categories section
Image paths resolve correctly to frontend/public/assets/generated/

requirements.text: In the Featured Products Showcase section (if it exists as a component), replace all broken or missing product images with the newly generated static image assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Each of the 8 product cards (Steel Tiffin Box, Pressure Cooker 5L, Non-Stick Kadai, Steel Glass Set, Casserole Set, Mixing Bowls Set, Vegetable Chopper, Stainless Steel Thali) must display a visible generated image appropriate for that product.

quotes: according to the sections display all the things because the pictures are not visible

acceptanceCriteria: All 8 featured product cards display a visible, relevant image
No broken image icons appear in the Featured Products section
Image paths resolve correctly to frontend/public/assets/generated/

requirements.text: In the Photo Gallery section, replace all broken or missing gallery images with the newly generated static image assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/. All 6 gallery grid items must display visible product or store images.

quotes: according to the sections display all the things because the pictures are not visible

acceptanceCriteria: All 6 gallery images are visible and load correctly
No broken image icons appear in the Photo Gallery section
Image paths resolve correctly to frontend/public/assets/generated/

requirements.text: In HeroSection.tsx, replace the broken or missing hero product image with the newly generated hero image asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/. The hero showcase card on the right side of the split layout must display the hero product image visibly.

quotes: according to the sections display all the things because the pictures are not visible

acceptanceCriteria: The hero section displays a visible, correctly loaded product image
No broken image icon appears in the hero section
Image path resolves correctly to frontend/public/assets/generated/

constraints: All product images must be generated and saved as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/ — do not fetch images from external URLs at runtime
Image filenames used in component src attributes must exactly match the generated asset filenames
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not modify backend logic — this is a frontend-only fix
nonGoals: Adding new product sections or changing product descriptions
Changing the visual theme or color palette
Implementing a CMS or dynamic image upload system
